sys_ui_page.html:
_CUT_HERE_ $[ var docapi = new x_snc_devtools.DocumentationAPI('x_snc_qrcode'); docapi.RenderHeader(); ]

Welcome to QRCode - created and maintained by Sascha Wildgrube.

Overview

$[ docapi.RenderDescription(); ]

Table of Contents

$[x_snc_devtools.HtmlRenderTableOfContents()]

Disclaimer

$[docapi.RenderDisclaimer()]

System Requirements

    $[ docapi.RenderSystemRequirements( 'Yokohama,Zurich', true, AppGetDependencies()); ]

Installation

    $[ docapi.RenderInstallationInstructionsImportFromSourceControl( 'DevTools', 'https://github.com/saschawildgrube/servicenow-devtools', true, 'https://www.wildgrube.com/servicenow-devtools/'); ] $[ docapi.RenderInstallationInstructionsImportFromSourceControl( 'QRCode', 'https://github.com/saschawildgrube/servicenow-qrcode'); ] $[ docapi.RenderInstallationInstructionsAppInstall(); ]

Features

Create QR codes by entering the payload and display them on the screen.

Create a PDF with 12 printable QR codes on one page.

Reference

Configuration Options

$[docapi.RenderProperties()]

Roles

$[docapi.RenderRoles()]

Tables

$[docapi.RenderTables()]

UI Actions

$[docapi.RenderUIActions()]

Script Includes

$[docapi.RenderScriptIncludes()]

Dependencies

$[docapi.RenderDependencies()]

Technical Debt

$[docapi.RenderTechnicalDebt()]

License

$[docapi.RenderCopyright(2026,'Sascha Wildgrube')] $[docapi.RenderLicense()]

Release Notes

1.0.0 - 2026-05-25

First baselined version

sys_ui_page.name: manual
